title: Arknights origins races
description: This project adds races in arknights into the minecraft using origins, so you can have races in games.
body:
This mod adds the races from the game Arknights into minecraft base on the origins mod. So you can use different talents from different races to improve the game expereince. 
Here are the races added into game:
- Agir
- Archosauria
- Caprinae
- Cautus
- Durin
- Elafia
- Feline
- Forte
- Kuranta
- Liberi
- Lupo
- Perro
- Phidia
- Sarkaz
- Savra
- Sankta
- Ursus
- Vouivre
- Vulpo
- Zalak
- Human (BOB's Originium dream needed)
- Seaborn (Caerula Arbor needed)
- Elf
- Anura
- Petram
- Draco
- Manticore

If you choose the Sarkaz race, now you can choose a subrace for you. The original talents for Sarkaz are moved to the subrace Goliath.
Here are the subraces for Sarkaz:
- Goliath
- Nachzehrer
- Vampire
- Diablo
- Gargoyle

If you choose the Seaborn race, now you can choose a subrace for you (up to 25 subraces).
Here are the subraces for Seaborn:
- Run Fish, Slider, Shooter Fish, Fly Fish, Reaper Fish, Creeper Fish, Puncture Fish;
- Baselayer Abyssal, Predator Abyssal, Guide Abyssal, Splasher Abyssal, Umbrella Abyssal, Cracker Abyssal;
- Collector Prokaryote, Depositer Prokaryote, Floater Prokaryote, Accumulator Prokaryote, Feeder Prokaryote, Apostle Prokaryote, Nucleic Maleficent;
- Bone Fish, Chiseler Fish, Pregnant Fish, Flee Fish, The Abandoned;

If there are any issues about the mod or any bugs, please tell me.
